name: get_monitors
description: Retrieve all monitors or specific monitors by ID. Returns current status (up/down/paused), uptime ratios, response times, and optionally event logs and response time data. All UptimeRobot API requests use POST method with the API key in the request body. Monitor statuses: 0=paused, 1=not checked yet, 2=up, 8=seems down, 9=down.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Your UptimeRobot API key (sent in POST body, not header).

parameters.name: monitors
parameters.description: Specific monitor IDs to retrieve, separated by dashes (e.g. '123-456-789'). Omit to get all.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Filter by monitor types separated by dashes: 1=HTTP(s), 2=Keyword, 3=Ping, 4=Port.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Filter by statuses separated by dashes: 0=paused, 1=not checked, 2=up, 8=seems down, 9=down.

parameters.name: custom_uptime_ratios
parameters.description: Number of days to calculate uptime ratios, separated by dashes (e.g. '1-7-30').

parameters.name: logs
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include event logs (up/down/paused events).

parameters.name: response_times
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include response time data.

parameters.name: response_times_limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of response time records returned (default 10).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of monitors to return (default 50, max 50).
